name: Scientific Report (HTML)
description: Render a typed JSON spec into a sophisticated, themed HTML report — magazine-grade typography, embedded interactive Plotly figures, plot/figure captions, validation tables, and glossary. Currently ships a 'broadsheet' theme used by the SCM-IR quickstart; intended as the shared renderer for any ScienceSwarm tutorial that wants a polished output page alongside its raw artifacts.
summary: Theme-driven HTML report renderer. Consumes a JSON spec and emits a single HTML file (interactive Plotly charts and Google Fonts loaded from CDNs at view time).
